commit_scope: Emit the Form-native world-model live training-cycle projection from the real mesh training runtime window, with source-backed senses, heldout/process/channel counts, and honest block reasons.

The runtime probe emitted world_model_live_cycle.status=blocked with observed=3, absent=2, heldout_count=7779, capability_ready=0, native_wins=0, growth_status=held, and explicit cycle block reasons.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Every real mesh training window now carries a world_model_live_cycle projection aligned with wmls-training-cycle. The projection lowers live Mac/Android witness summaries, capability/process/channel/heldout counts, native-teacher and world-growth state, and explicit block reasons into a row that the Form emitter band can validate.
public_endpoints: local-only: scripts/real_mesh_training_emitters.sh writes real-mesh-training-window.json; no public HTTP endpoint changed
test_flows: A complete emitted cycle requires observed live senses, at least twelve heldout rows, capability readiness, a native win, embodied growth, and a Form recipe reference.
A blocked runtime cycle remains acceptable when it carries real block reasons and the Form recipe reference.
Malformed blocked cycle projections without reasons are rejected.
The runtime probe projected the live witness source into a blocked cycle with concrete missing capability/process/native/world-growth proof instead of marking it ready.
